Hacker News Confidence

Less annoying hacker news. (What is this?)

This site scrapes Hacker News once every 30 minutes, then sorts according to this formula, with upvotes as positive signals and comments as negative ones. In my experience, the best articles to read on HN are the ones with a high upvote-to-discussion ratio. Mostly because controversial pieces tend to produce a disproportionate number of comments compared to upvotes.


  1. Category Theory Illustrated – Types 76 upvotes, 2 comments
  2. Show HN: TurboQuant for vector search – 2-4 bit compression 71 upvotes, 5 comments
  3. Go on Embedded Systems and WebAssembly 80 upvotes, 10 comments
  4. Show HN: Apfel – The free AI already on your Mac 599 upvotes, 136 comments
  5. Show HN: I built a frontpage for personal blogs 563 upvotes, 159 comments
  6. A Recipe for Steganogravy 121 upvotes, 28 comments
  7. What changes when you turn a Linux box into a router 11 upvotes, 0 comments
  8. What we learned building 100 API integrations with OpenCode 85 upvotes, 18 comments
  9. iNaturalist 246 upvotes, 67 comments
  10. You can now run a full Linux operating system inside a 6mb PDF 48 upvotes, 9 comments
  11. Oracle Files H-1B Visa Petitions Amid Mass Layoffs 63 upvotes, 15 comments
  12. Show HN: Ismcpdead.com – Live dashboard tracking MCP adoption and sentiment 9 upvotes, 0 comments
  13. What Category Theory Teaches Us About DataFrames 164 upvotes, 52 comments
  14. Build your own Dial-up ISP with a Raspberry Pi 66 upvotes, 17 comments
  15. April 2026 TLDR Setup for Ollama and Gemma 4 26B on a Mac mini 264 upvotes, 106 comments
  16. SSH certificates: the better SSH experience 179 upvotes, 72 comments
  17. How to Make a Sliding, Self-Locking, and Predator-Proof Chicken Coop Door (2020) 34 upvotes, 10 comments
  18. We replaced RAG with a virtual filesystem for our AI documentation assistant 148 upvotes, 71 comments
  19. Samsung Magician disk utility takes 18 steps and two reboots to uninstall 345 upvotes, 187 comments
  20. ESP32-S31: Dual-Core RISC-V SoC with Wi-Fi 6, Bluetooth 5.4, and Advanced HMI 183 upvotes, 105 comments
  21. Firm boosts H.264 streaming license fees from $100k up to staggering $4.5M 74 upvotes, 42 comments
  22. TDF ejects its core developers 142 upvotes, 93 comments
  23. Artemis II crew take 'spectacular' image of Earth 71 upvotes, 42 comments
  24. Async Python Is Secretly Deterministic 28 upvotes, 17 comments
  25. Automatic Textbook Formalization 7 upvotes, 2 comments
  26. Big-Endian Testing with QEMU 75 upvotes, 69 comments
  27. PIGuard: Prompt Injection Guardrail via Mitigating Overdefense for Free 5 upvotes, 1 comments
  28. Update on the eBay Scam 14 upvotes, 18 comments
  29. F-15E jet shot down over Iran 212 upvotes, 486 comments
  30. Show HN: We're building an AI hedge fund 4 upvotes, 10 comments

Last generated 5:00am, 4 April 2026. Source here.
